title: The Day Everything Went Wrong
content: Marcus knew the day would be difficult from the moment his alarm failed to ring that morning. He spilled coffee on his shirt before leaving home, missed the train by seconds, and arrived late to an important meeting already feeling stressed. Throughout the afternoon, problems continued appearing one after another. His computer crashed during a presentation, several clients complained unexpectedly, and heavy rain soaked him completely while walking back to the station. By evening, Marcus felt emotionally drained by the constant series of small disasters. Yet while sitting alone on the train ride home, he suddenly started laughing quietly to himself. Some days simply collapsed under their own chaos, and resisting that reality only made them feel worse.
